title: Super TNT Mod
description: A port from the 1.7.2/1.12.2 Super TNT Mod with official support from the original creator Veraster!
body:
Super TNT mod is coming to 1.20.1+!

Veraster has supplied the original mod's source code and assets so this can happen. Huge thank you to Manu5l for testing and making some of the TNTs, Jayden4293 for making a few TNTs, PhilTheBuilder for inspiration and olotheoriginal for some of the optimized explosion code and logic!

Found a bug, have a question or just want to discuss the mod? Join the official TNT discord server: https://discord.gg/aWDEk7EZ9u

## ALL TNT NOW FUNCTIONAL!
